articles.title: Google 2-way Sync Frequently Asked Questions
articles.excerpt: This will be useful if: You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform. You are trying to:  Connect your Google...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform.
 

You are trying to: 

  • Connect your Google Calendar to your EzLicence calendar

  • Sync your Google events into EzLicence or troubleshoot missing events

  • Reconnect your calendar after a failed or expired connection

  • Keep your availability accurate across both calendar

  • Understand which Google events get synced

  • Manage or adjust your calendar sync settings

  • Disconnect or remove the Google Calendar sync

  • Resolve double-ups, conflicts, or incorrect event times

  • Protect your privacy and understand what information EzLicence can and cannot access

Overview:

EzLicence’s 2-way Google Calendar sync allows you to keep your availability and lesson bookings accurate across both calendars. When enabled, EzLicence reads your selected Google calendars to block out busy times and automatically adds your EzLicence bookings to Google Calendar. This FAQ covers common questions, troubleshooting steps, privacy information, and tips to help you get the most out of calendar sync.

Frequently Asked Questions:

What does Google Calendar sync do?

Google Calendar sync helps keep both calendars accurate and up to date by:

  • Blocking out time on EzLicence when you're busy in your selected Google calendars

  • Adding EzLicence lesson bookings into your Google Calendar so you can see all your work alongside your personal plans

What if 2-way Sync fails?

If the sync fails due to a temporary connection issue, It will automatically retry after a few seconds.
However, if the failure is caused by an invalid or expired Google token, you will need to reconnect your Google Calendar. Simply go to your EzLicence calendar settings and complete the connection process again.

Which Google Calendar items get synced. 

EzLicence syncs the following types of Google Calendar entries:

  • Events

  • Out of Office

  • Focus Time

These items will appear in your EzLicence calendar as busy time to help prevent double-bookings.

How do I stay in control of what’s synced?

You remain fully in control of your connection at all times:

  • Choose which Google calendars to sync when setting up

  • Adjust your calendar selection or disconnect sync anytime from your settings

  • Review and resolve any conflicts if a Google Calendar event overlaps with an EzLicence booking

Why are EzLicence events appearing twice in my Google Calendar?

You may see duplicate EzLicence events in your Google Calendar because two different sources are adding the same booking.

  • Scenario 1: Email-created events (ICS files)

    Your Gmail may be automatically adding events to your calendar when you receive EzLicence booking confirmation emails. These ICS-generated events create the first version of the booking.

  • Scenario 2: Events from Google 2-Way Sync

    Your EzLicence 2-way sync also adds lesson events to your Google Calendar. This creates the second version of the same booking.

How to fix it

To prevent duplicates, go to your EzLicence Calendar Settings and scroll down to the “Attach calendar event to booking email” option. Set this to ‘No’ to stop booking emails from automatically creating calendar events.
This ensures that only the events coming from your Google 2-way sync appear in your Google Calendar.

Why can't I edit or delete EzLicence events in my Google calendar? 

EzLicence bookings appear as read-only in your Google Calendar because EzLicence is the source of truth for all lesson bookings.

Any edits you make directly in Google Calendar—such as changing or deleting an EzLicence event—will not sync back to EzLicence and will not update the actual booking.

To update, reschedule, or cancel a lesson, you’ll need to make those changes within the EzLicence platform. Once updated, the changes will automatically sync to your Google Calendar.

How do I hide Google Event details in EzLicence Calendar?

To hide Google events from your EzLicence Calendar, go to your EzLicence Calendar Settings, scroll down to Synced Calendar Visibility and change the setting from Show to Hide. click Save Changes 

How do I edit Google Event details in EzLicence Calendar?

To edit a Google event in your EzLicence calendar, click the event you want to update. A small pop-up will appear at the bottom of your screen.

Click the pop-up to open the full event view. Make your changes, click Save.

Check your Google Calendar to confirm that the update has synced successfully.

What if there is a double-up or conflict between my EzLicence calendar and my Google Calendar?

Double-ups happen when a Google event overlaps with an EzLicence booking. Make sure your Google Calendar is up to date and remove any old or incorrect events to avoid conflicts.

Once Google events sync, those time slots are no longer available for learners to book.

Tips:

  • Avoid Double-Ups – Google events overlap your EzLicence bookings.
  • Clear Conflicting Google Events – Remove outdated or incorrect Google events.
  • Fix Calendar Overlaps – Overlapping events may block bookings.
  • Protect Your Bookings – Conflicts may affect your availability
  • Quick Calendar Check – Clean up Google events to keep things running smoothly. 

Do instructors receive SMS notifications for calendar conflicts?

Yes. Instructors will receive an SMS notification the day before their bookings.

  • If a calendar conflict is detected:
    Reminder: Calendar conflict(s) detected — please check your schedule. {X} booking(s) tomorrow. View: http://xxxx

  • If no conflict is detected:
    Reminder: {X} booking(s) tomorrow. View: http://xxxx

These reminders help instructors review their schedule and resolve any potential conflicts ahead of time.

Why are my Google events not syncing into the EzLicence calendar, even though EzLicence events sync to Google? How do I fix it?

This usually happens when no Google calendars were selected during the initial setup.

To fix the issue follow the step by step guide on How to set up Google Calendar 2-way sync.

Ensure you select a calendar to sync. If no calendar is selected—or if the setup window is closed without confirming—Google events will not sync back into your EzLicence calendar.

How do birthday events affect availability?

Google Calendar categorises events as either Busy or Free, which determines your availability for bookings. 

  • Busy events:
    You will not be available for new bookings during this time.

  • Free events:
    You will remain available for new bookings.

Note: Birthday events in Google Calendar are marked as Free by default, so they will not block your availability unless you change the event to Busy.

How do I change the travel time for my personal Google events?

If you’d like to adjust the amount of travel time for your personal Google Calendar events in EzLicence, go to your EzLicence Calendar Settings and scroll down to Travel Buffer settings, under Synced Calendar Events click the drop down arrow and select your preferred travel time between events.

Why don’t the times on my Google events match the times in my EzLicence calendar?

This usually happens when your Google Calendar is set to a different time zone than the locations (postcodes/areas) where you provide services in EzLicence. When the time zones don’t match, events may appear at incorrect times.

To fix this, update your Google Calendar time zone so it aligns with the region where you are delivering lessons. This will ensure your availability and bookings display accurately in EzLicence.

Will learners see my personal calendar?

Learners never see your personal events. They only see whether a time is available or not—your private Google Calendar details are never shared.

EzLicence prevents Google events from changing or cancelling any existing EzLicence bookings. The EzLicence platform remains the source of truth for all learner bookings, ensuring bookings stay accurate and protected.

Calendar access is strictly limited to what’s required to manage your availability. All tokens are securely stored, encrypted, and refreshed automatically in line with data security policies.

Will EzLicence be able to see all my personal events?

EzLicence only has access to the specific Google calendars you choose to sync. You can include or exclude calendars at any time—for example, you might connect your “Work / Driving Lessons” calendar but leave your “Personal” or “Family” calendar unshared.

The connection uses Google’s secure OAuth 2.0 process, which means EzLicence receives permission only for calendar access. We cannot access your emails, contacts, or files.

EzLicence uses your selected calendar events solely to:

  • Block out busy times so learners can’t book over your personal commitments

  • Add your EzLicence lesson bookings into your Google Calendar so you can see all your bookings in one place.

What can EzLicence not see?

EzLicence cannot:

  • See or access any Google calendars you do not select

  • Access your emails, contacts, photos, or Google Drive files

  • Show your personal appointment details to learners—they only see whether a time is available or not

How do I set up Google Calendar 2-way sync?

For step-by-step instructions see our support article How to set up Google Calendar 2-way sync here

Existing Instructors $500 Cash Bonus Terms and Conditions
articles.excerpt: This offer is made by EZ LICENCE PTY LTD (ABN 43 612 095 968) (EzLicence) to independent driving instructors who: are existing EzLicence...
articles.content:
1. This offer is made by EZ LICENCE PTY LTD (ABN 43 612 095 968) (EzLicence) to independent driving instructors who:
    1. are existing EzLicence instructors who are specifically selected and notified by EzLicence in writing as part of this campaign;
    2. are based in Brisbane, Gold Coast or Sunshine Coast; and
    3. otherwise comply with EzLicence’s standard terms, conditions, policies and Driving Instructor code of conduct (Eligible Instructors).
  2. Subject to these terms, an Eligible Instructor will qualify for a one-off AUD $500 cash incentive, inclusive of GST if, during their applicable Promotion Period they complete at least 130 Booking Hours in Brisbane, Gold Coast, or Sunshine Coast.
  3. The Promotion Period is between 1 January 2026 to 31 March 2026 (inclusive).
  4. For the purposes of these terms, “Booking Hours” means the total scheduled duration (in hours) of lessons and/or test packs that:
    1. are booked and completed via the EzLicence marketplace during the Promotion Period;
    2. are fully paid and not cancelled, reversed, refunded or otherwise invalid; and
    3. are completed on or during the Promotion Period (local time).
    4. Booking Hours do not include private lessons, private test packs, cancelled, reversed, pending or unconfirmed bookings, or any booking scheduled to start outside the Promotion Period.
  5. The Incentive is limited to one payment per instructor. The Incentive is paid in addition to the instructor’s standard EzLicence earnings and will not reduce or replace any other payments due under EzLicence’s standard terms.
  6. EzLicence will calculate and verify Booking Hours after the end of the Promotion Period. EzLicence will use its internal records to determine eligibility, and those records will be conclusive in the absence of manifest error.
  7. For Eligible Instructors who have met the Booking Hours requirement, the Incentive will be paid with the instructor’s next scheduled earnings payout following EzLicence’s verification of results, and in any event within 30 days after 31 March 2026. Payment will be made via the instructor’s usual EzLicence payout method.
  8. The Incentive is personal to the Eligible Instructor and cannot be transferred, assigned or exchanged for any other benefit. Eligible Instructors will receive direct communication from EzLicence regarding this offer. Instructors may opt out of the offer at any time by contacting EzLicence support; opting out will forfeit any entitlement to the Incentive.
  9. The Incentive amount of AUD $500 is inclusive of GST, where applicable. Instructors are solely responsible for any tax obligations (including GST and income tax) that arise from receiving the Incentive, and EzLicence will not withhold or remit taxes on an instructor’s behalf unless required by law.
  10. Participation in this offer is subject to EzLicence’s standard terms and policies, which apply in addition to these terms. EzLicence may verify eligibility, including identity, location and Booking Hours, and may withhold or refuse payment in cases of ineligibility, breach of EzLicence’s terms or policies, or suspected fraud.
  11. EzLicence may amend, suspend or withdraw this offer at any time by publishing updated terms or otherwise notifying Eligible Instructors, provided that any such change will not adversely affect Incentives that have already been earned by Eligible Instructors who have met the Booking Hours requirement before the effective date of the change.
  12. Nothing in these terms excludes, restricts or modifies any rights or remedies that cannot be excluded under the Australian Consumer Law or other applicable laws. To the extent permitted by law, EzLicence’s liability in connection with this offer is limited to supplying the Incentive or paying the cost of supplying the Incentive again.

articles.title: EzLicence Driving Test Pass Guarantee Promotion - Terms & Conditions
articles.excerpt: This promotion is made by EZ LICENCE PTY LTD (ABN 43 612 095 968) (EzLicence) and applies to eligible learners who complete at least ten...
articles.content:
This promotion is made by EZ LICENCE PTY LTD (ABN 43 612 095 968) (EzLicence) and applies to eligible learners who complete at least ten driving lessons and one driving test pack through EzLicence via http://www.ezlicence.com.au (Eligible Requirements).

Under this promotion, where a learner satisfies the Eligible Requirements, the “Pass Guarantee” means that if the learner fails the driving test undertaken as part of the completed driving test pack, EzLicence will provide one additional driving test pack at no additional cost by issuing account credits to the learner equal to the value of a standard test pack, subject to these terms and limited to a maximum of $260 in account credits. For the purposes of this promotion, “completed” means the lesson or driving test pack booking was booked, delivered and marked as complete through the EzLicence platform, and does not include bookings that are cancelled, rescheduled, reverted, refunded, disputed, unpaid or otherwise invalid.

To qualify for the additional test pack, the learner must have completed at least ten lessons and the original driving test pack through EzLicence and must have failed that driving test. The learner must contact EzLicence support at [https://support.ezlicence.com.au/hc/en-au](https://support.ezlicence.com.au/hc/en-au) to request the additional test pack. The additional test pack is not automatically issued and will only be provided following review and confirmation by EzLicence, which may require evidence of the failed test including, without limitation, an official test result summary, assessment report, licensing authority documentation, or other confirmation reasonably requested by EzLicence.

EzLicence reserves the right to verify the learner’s test outcome, including confirming whether the learner passed or failed their most recent driving test, before issuing any credits. EzLicence may refuse to issue the additional test pack where it reasonably determines that the claim is duplicate, invalid, misleading, fraudulent, or where these terms have not been complied with.

The additional test pack will be provided as EzLicence account credits only, is non-transferable, non refundable, and cannot be exchanged for cash or any other benefit. Only one additional complimentary test pack may be issued per eligible learner.

EzLicence reserves the right to amend, suspend or withdraw this promotion at any time in its discretion. Where the promotion is withdrawn or amended, learners who have already completed at least ten lessons and a driving test pack prior to the effective date of the change will remain eligible for the promotion, provided those lessons and the test pack are completed within six months of the date the promotion is withdrawn or amended and otherwise in accordance with these terms.

Where the promotion is withdrawn or amended, learners who have already completed at least ten lessons and a driving test pack prior to the effective date of the change will remain eligible for the promotion, provided those lessons and the test pack are completed within six months of the date the promotion is withdrawn or amended and otherwise in accordance with these terms.

For clarity, EzLicence’s standard Refund Policy, as published on our website and updated from time to time, continues to apply to all purchases made in connection with this promotion.

Nothing in these terms excludes, restricts or modifies any rights that cannot be excluded under the Australian Consumer Law or other applicable laws. To the extent permitted by law, EzLicence’s liability in connection with this promotion is limited to issuing the account credits for one additional driving test pack.

articles.title: EzLicence Instructor Academy Referral Fee Program Terms and Condition
articles.excerpt: This referral program is made by EZ LICENCE PTY LTD (ABN 43 612 095 968) (EzLicence) and applies to the EzLicence Instructor Academy....
articles.content:
This referral program is made by EZ LICENCE PTY LTD (ABN 43 612 095 968) (EzLicence) and applies to the EzLicence Instructor Academy. Participation constitutes acceptance of these terms and EzLicence’s applicable policies.

The program applies only to enrolments in the Certificate IV in Motor Vehicle Driver Training Standard Package and excludes upgrade courses, limited practical courses, or any other course unless expressly stated by EzLicence.

For the purposes of these terms, “Referrer” means the person submitting the referral, “Referee” means the individual being referred to the EzLicence Instructor Academy, and “Qualifying Payment” means the successful enrolment in an eligible course together with payment in full, or entry into an approved payment arrangement and payment of any required initial instalment, as determined by EzLicence.

A referral fee is payable to an eligible referrer for each referred student who satisfies all eligibility requirements. To qualify, the referred student must not have previously been referred by another party or previously contacted, enquired with, engaged with EzLicence marketing and/or sales outreach, or commenced an application or enrolment process with the EzLicence Instructor Academy, must be referred in the manner specified by EzLicence, must enrol in an eligible course within 30 days of referral, must meet all applicable state and regulatory eligibility requirements, and must successfully enrol and make payment in full or enter into an approved payment arrangement and make any required initial payment as determined by EzLicence.

A referral will only be recognised where the referee expressly identifies the referrer by name at the time of initial enquiry or before the point of enrolment, either via the contact form on the EzLicence Instructor Academy page (https://www.ezlicence.com.au/instructor-academy) or during first communication with an EzLicence Instructor Academy representative.

Referral fees are payable only once per eligible referred student and only after EzLicence verifies successful enrolment and qualifying payment. Referral fees are inclusive of GST where applicable, personal to the referrer, non transferable, non assignable and not redeemable for any other benefit. The referral discount cannot be combined with any other promotional offer, discount, rebate or incentive unless expressly approved in writing by EzLicence.

A referral fee will not be payable where the referral is duplicate, invalid, misleading or fraudulent, where the student was previously referred or already in contact with the Academy, where the student fails to enrol within 30 days, fails to meet eligibility requirements, withdraws, cancels or receives a refund, or where EzLicence declines enrolment for any reason. EzLicence’s internal records are conclusive in determining referral validity and eligibility in the absence of manifest error.

Referral fees will be paid within 30 business days after EzLicence confirms the Referee’s successful enrolment and Qualifying Payment. Where the Referrer is an active EzLicence instructor with a payout account, the referral fee will be paid via the Referrer’s nominated instructor payout method in accordance with the payout frequency selected by the Referrer. Where the Referrer is not an active EzLicence instructor with a payout account, payment will be made via bank transfer to a bank account nominated by the Referrer. Referrers are solely responsible for any tax obligations arising from receipt of a referral fee and EzLicence will not withhold or remit taxes unless required by law.

EzLicence may verify identity and compliance with these terms and may withhold or refuse payment in cases of ineligibility, breach of applicable terms or policies, or suspected fraud or misconduct.

This referral program may be amended, suspended, withdrawn or replaced at any time at EzLicence’s discretion, and the applicable referral fee amount, eligibility criteria and conditions will be those in effect at the time the referred student enrols. Changes will not affect referral fees that have already been earned in accordance with the terms in effect at the time of enrolment.

Referrers must not refer themselves, related entities, employees, family members or any person for whom the referrer receives direct or indirect financial benefit from enrolment. EzLicence may withhold or recover referral fees where it reasonably suspects artificial, coordinated or non-arm’s length referrals.

EzLicence may limit the number of eligible referral fees payable to any single referrer to a maximum of ten (10) successful referred enrolments per calendar month under this program. Referrals in excess of this limit may, at EzLicence’s discretion, be deemed ineligible for payment unless otherwise agreed in writing. Referrers who anticipate referring volumes in excess of this cap on an ongoing basis are encouraged to contact EzLicence to discuss a separate commercial arrangement or volume-based referral agreement.

Nothing in these terms excludes, restricts or modifies any rights that cannot be excluded under the Australian Consumer Law or other applicable laws. To the extent permitted by law, EzLicence’s liability in connection with this program is limited to payment of the applicable referral fee.

articles.title: Temporary Fuel Surge Terms and Conditions
articles.excerpt: 1. What the fuel surcharge isA temporary fuel surcharge may be applied to eligible purchases to help offset increased fuel costs for...
articles.content:
1. What the fuel surcharge is

A temporary fuel surcharge may be applied to eligible purchases to help offset increased fuel costs for driving instructors. Any fuel surcharge collected is intended to be passed through to the relevant instructor.

2. When the fuel surcharge applies

The fuel surcharge applies to eligible purchases and credit top-ups made after the feature is introduced. It does not apply retrospectively to credits or purchases made before this time.

3. What the fuel surcharge applies to

The fuel surcharge applies to eligible lesson hours. It may also apply to other products, including TPs, where this is clearly indicated in the checkout flow or applicable product-specific terms.

4. How the surcharge is calculated

Where applicable, the fuel surcharge is calculated on a per-hour basis. The applicable surcharge (if any) will be displayed at checkout at the time of purchase or top-up.

5. Full-hour rule for top-ups

Where a learner tops up credits, the fuel surcharge is only applied to the portion of the top-up that corresponds to full lesson hours.

If part of a top-up does not complete a full lesson hour at the applicable instructor’s rate, that portion will not attract a fuel surcharge.

6. Credits and mixed balances

Learners may hold a mix of credits, including credits purchased at different times, at different instructor rates, or promotional credits.

Credits may be used in a set order determined by the platform. Where a booking uses a mix of different credit types, this may affect whether a fuel surcharge applies to each lesson hour.

7. Fuel surcharge and credit usage

The fuel surcharge is applied to eligible purchases and is associated with the underlying credits used.

As bookings may be funded by a mix of different credit types (including credits purchased at different times or rates), the fuel surcharge may not apply to every lesson hour booked.

8. Instructor changes and different hourly rates

If a learner books with an instructor whose hourly rate differs from the instructor from whom the credits were originally purchased, the number of lesson hours and fuel surcharge applied may not align on a one-to-one basis.

In such cases, the fuel surcharge may apply to some lesson hours and not others, depending on how credits are allocated to the booking.

9. Promotional and non-surcharge credits

Certain credits, including promotional or bonus credits, may not carry a fuel surcharge. Where these credits are used for a booking, a fuel surcharge may not apply to that portion of the lesson.

10. Instructor payment

Where applicable, the fuel surcharge is passed through in connection with eligible completed lessons. The amount received by an instructor may vary depending on the credits used to fund the booking.

11. Visibility and checkout

Fuel surcharge amounts may be shown as separate line items in checkout and/or transaction summaries. The checkout display at the time of purchase or top-up is the source of truth for any applicable charges.

12. Refunds

Fuel surcharge charges are non-refundable except as required under applicable consumer law.

13. Temporary feature

The fuel surcharge is intended to be temporary and may be amended, extended, withdrawn, or discontinued at EzLicence’s discretion.

articles.title: Lesson Duration Options for Instructors
articles.excerpt: How to enable and manage your lesson duration optionsThis will be useful if:You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking...
articles.content:
This will be useful if:

You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to:

Enable additional lesson duration options on your account so learners can book lessons in lengths beyond the standard 1-hour and 2-hour bookings.

Overview:

We’ve introduced new lesson duration options on EzLicence, giving you more flexibility over the lessons you offer and giving learners more booking choice. You can now offer 1.5hr, 3hr, 4hr and 5hr lessons in addition to the required 1hr and 2hr durations. This guide will walk you through how to enable these options, how pricing works, and what to do if a learner can’t book a longer lesson with you.

How to enable additional lesson durations

Step 1.

Log in to your instructor account.

Step 2.

From your Dashboard, click the Settings icon on the left side of your screen, then navigate to Calendar Settings.

Step 3.

Scroll to the Lesson Duration section. You’ll see all six lesson length options.

Step 4.

Tick the optional durations you’d like to offer (1.5hr, 3hr, 4hr, 5hr). You can untick any you no longer want available at any time.

Note: 1hr and 2hr lessons are required platform durations and cannot be removed. If you need either changed, this can only be done by an EzLicence admin.

Step 5.

Save your changes. Once saved, learners will immediately be able to book lessons of those durations from your profile — provided you have enough continuous availability in your calendar to fit the lesson.

How lesson prices are calculated

Lesson prices are calculated automatically from your hourly rate. You don’t need to set individual prices for each duration.

For example, if your hourly rate is $70/hr:

  • 1hr = $70
  • 1.5hr = $105
  • 2hr = $140
  • 3hr = $210
  • 4hr = $280
  • 5hr = $350

The full breakdown is shown on your public profile in the Hourly Price section. Learners can expand the dropdown to see pricing for each duration you offer.

When expanded, learners see the price for every duration you’ve enabled, plus any bulk-hour discounts and Test Packages.

Troubleshooting: a learner says they can’t book a longer lesson with me

If a learner can’t see or book a longer lesson with you, it’s usually one of the following:

  1. The duration isn’t enabled. Check Calendar Settings → Lesson Duration and confirm the duration is ticked and saved.
  2. You don’t have enough continuous availability. A learner can only book a 3-hour lesson if you have a continuous 3-hour block free in your calendar. The same logic applies for 4hr and 5hr lessons.
  3. The selected date/time doesn’t fit the duration. The learner may need to try a different slot with a larger continuous block.

If you’ve checked all of the above and the issue persists, reach out to EzLicence support with a screenshot of your Calendar Settings and the date/time the learner was trying to book.

articles.title: How to change your driving instructor
articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform You are trying to:  Change your driving instructor....
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform

You are trying to: 

Change your driving instructor.

Overview:

The EzLicence platform has been designed to provide you with maximum flexibility. We understand that things can change, sometimes your availability doesn't match or a driving instructor is not the right fit for you and your learning preferences.

As an EzLicence learner, you are able to change driving instructors free of charge online up to 24 hrs prior to the booking start time. 

Important: If you have existing bookings with your current driving instructor that you don't wish to keep, you will need to cancel them first. Please be aware that you can only cancel bookings up to 24 hrs prior to the booking start time without incurring a fee.

How to change your driving instructor

Step 1.

Log in to your learner account

Step 2.

On your Dashboard, click Book another instructor. 

Step 3.

A list of driving instructors servicing your area and chosen transmission will be displayed. Click Book Online Now, next to the driving instructor of your choice.

Step 4.

The ‘Make a Booking’ screen will appear. Choose either, Book Driving Lesson or Book Driving Test Package

Step 5.

Select the driving lesson duration, day and time for your booking.

Step 6.

Enter pick up location, click Save.

Step 7.

The ‘Make A Booking’ confirmation screen will appear. Review your booking, then click Confirm Booking/s. You will be taken back to your Dashboard, where your new booking will be displayed under Upcoming Bookings.

Rate your learning experience and provide any additional feedback.

articles.title: How to complete a 2-step verification
articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform. You are trying to:  Log in to your...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

Log in to your instructor account and you require a 2-step verification code

Overview:

EzLicence uses a 2-Step verification process, this is an industry standard way of verifying that it is actually you who is logging into your account.  This security feature requires you to input a 6-digit code, in addition to your email address and password, when logging in to EzLicence. 

By adding 2-Step verification, the personal information held in your EzLicence account has an extra layer of protection and security, should your login and password be compromised in any way.

How to complete a 2-step verification

Step 1.

Start the process to log in to your account, if you need further instructions, click here.

Step 2.

Before clicking Login, click the box just below the password field that says Remember me for 60 days. If you are using private or incognito browser settings, the 'Remember me for 60 days' will not work.

Step 3.

Click Login, you will receive an SMS to your mobile phone with a 6-digit code. It will also be sent via email. The code will remain valid for 5 minutes.

Step 4.

Enter this code and click Verify. You will then be logged in and on your Dashboard. 

Step 5. (optional)

If you do not receive the code within 60 seconds, please click Resend and enter the new code.

Still need help?
If you are unsure of how it works or need help accessing your account, please contact our team.

articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

View the reviews that your learners have provided.

Overview:

Reviews are one of the ways EzLicence builds trust between learners and instructors. It helps learners make informed decisions and provides instructors with honest feedback to help them improve. 

EzLicence asks for a review from every learner who completes at least one driving lesson with you.  Learners provide a review by logging into their learner account. Some learners will leave only a rating, others will provide comments with their rating.

All learner reviews are published on your public profile immediately after the review has been submitted. Your 25 most recent reviews are visible on your profile, allowing learners to read the reviews that are the most relevant to their decision to choose you.

If you do not have 25 reviews yet, any reviews which were ratings only, will also be displayed.

How to view your learner reviews

Step 1.

Log in to your instructor account.

Step 2.

On your Dashboard, find the Performance section.

Step 3.

Under All Time you will see learner rating.

Step 4.

Just below this, click the View all reviews link

Step 5. 

You will be able to view all your reviews (ratings with comments).

You are able to view the Review Policy at any time.

Reporting reviews under this policy

To report a review that violates this policy, contact us. Please provide our team with as much information as possible to support your request and to ensure a quick resolution.

Only the EzLicence Team is able to make changes to Learner’s review once it has been submitted, please do not contact learners directly to discuss their review. 

Handling negative reviews

Whilst receiving positive feedback is encouraging, receiving negative feedback can be challenging. 

Your learners are the best source of feedback on your service and their feedback is critical for making your service the best it can be. It is always important to review the situation from your learner’s perspective and take any criticisms constructively, rather than personally.  Negative or constructive feedback is an excellent learning experience to understand how you can improve the service that you deliver to learners.  

For our top tips on how to deliver a positive lesson experience, click here.

articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform. You are trying to:  Keep track of your...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

Keep track of your learners and their progress.

Overview:

Sometimes a learner does not show up for their booking, they may have forgotten or had issues on the day.

How to handle a learner 'no show'

In the event that this occurs, please do the following:

  1. Double check that you are at the address on the booking
  2. Call the learner. If there is no answer, follow it up with an SMS (double check the phone number)
  3. If there is another contact on the account, please call them and follow up with an SMS
  4. Where possible, knock on the front door

If the learner is a no show and you have made an attempt to contact them, you have the option to:

  • Leave the pick up address and reverse the fee for the booking, for further information click here or
  • Remain at the pick up address and charge the learner for the booking

If you intend to charge the learner for the booking:

Take a photo of your car in front of the pick up address, this may be required if a learner disputes the charge.

There may be instances where the learner arrives 20 minutes late and wishes to do a 40 minute lesson. Please refer to the Driving Instructor Cancellation Policy for further information.

Remember, you are getting paid.

articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform. You are trying to:  Add or remove suburbs...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

Add or remove suburbs from where you service.

Overview:

The EzLicence booking system allows you to make changes to your driving instructor profile at any time. This includes making changes to the suburbs you service.

IMPORTANT - when changing your service region

  • Removing a suburb/s - all existing bookings in your calendar will remain. All learners who have completed a booking will be able to book again and you will need to deliver their driving lessons.
  • Adding a suburb/s - make sure that you can cover your service region in your allocated travel time

How to change your service area

Step 1.

Log in to your instructor account.

Step 2.
On your Dashboard, on the left side of your screen, click the Settings icon.

Step 3.
Select Service Area. A Google Map and suburb list will appear.

Step 4.
Click the Edit Service Region button (located above the map on right side)

Step 5.

Whilst in editing mode, you can make changes by either using:

  • The map, click suburbs on and off
  • The text box, type the area name or click the “x” in the areas list to remove it

Step 6.

Click Save Changes

articles.title: Driving Instructors: Manage Driving Test Packages
articles.excerpt: An EzLicence driving test package will block 2.5hrs in your calendar and includes the following:  Pick-up 1hr prior to test start time 45...
articles.content:
An EzLicence driving test package will block 2.5hrs in your calendar and includes the following:

  • Pick-up 1hr prior to test start time
  • 45 min pre-test warm up - starts from when the learner gets in the car
  • Help checking in to the test centre
  • Use of driving instructors vehicle to sit the test
  • Drop-off after the test result is received

We do not offer driving test packages in ACT, SA and TAS.

EzLicence does not book the test at the test centre. This is displayed on our website and again on our booking form.

We recommend, as soon as you receive a test pack booking, that you contact the learner to request a copy of their booking confirmation issued by the local roads authority. Doing this ahead of the booking allows changes to be made in the event that they have made a mistake.

If the learner has not booked a test with the local roads authority, as the driving instructor it is your decision whether to charge the learner for the test package or waive the fee and reschedule it.

articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

Have your supervised hours signed off in your logbook.

Overview:

In most states of Australia, you are required to complete a minimum number of supervised driving hours before you can sit for your driving test. This does not apply to ALL learners, there are age limits that apply and this can vary from state to state.

Your logbook is a record of the hours you have driven under supervision.

When it comes to completing your learner logbook for each journey, this is something that only your driving instructor can sign off on. To resolve any logbook issues, please contact your driving instructor directly.

Remember that your driving instructor is often in driving lessons and unable to answer their phone. They will return your call or text message as soon as they can.

Unfortunately, our support team is unable to assist you with this.

articles.title: How to add another learner to your account
articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform. You are trying to:  Add another learner to your...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

Add another learner to your existing account.

Overview:

The EzLicence booking platform was designed with the learner in mind. Unfortunately, our system does not support multiple learners using the one learner account. You will need to set up an account for each new learner. Each account will need to be linked to a different email address.

By having a unique account per learner, managing the bookings with your driving instructor is made really simple. 

Bookings can be rescheduled or cancelled effectively, and the ability to change driving instructors can be handled cleanly.  

Additionally, important information about your upcoming bookings is communicated to both you and your driving instructor.  If this information is not accurate, it can create issues with upcoming bookings and booking management.

Trying to manage bookings for multiple learners using the same learner account will create several issues, as well as cause user frustration and confusion.

articles.title: How to buy a gift voucher
articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform. You are trying to:  Buy a gift voucher. Overview: With...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

Buy a gift voucher.

Overview:

With the largest availability of driving instructors in Australia, we are the best place to buy your driving lesson gift voucher. Your recipient can create their own profile, choose from the available driving instructors and then make their own driving lesson bookings online.

Before purchasing, we recommend checking that we have driving instructors available in your recipient's suburb. You can do this by entering the recipient's pickup suburb and preferred transmission type into the search tool on our dedicated gift voucher page.

How to buy a gift voucher

Step 1.

In the top right hand side of your screen, click the Menu.

Step 2.

Select Gift Vouchers.

Step 3.

At the bottom of the screen, click Buy a gift voucher.

Step 4.

Make a selection from the dropdown, what is the occasion?

There are different images attached to each occasion.  You can click Preview at the bottom of the screen at any time to view your voucher.

Step 5. 

Under the Delivery method, choose how you want the gift voucher delivered.

Step 6. 

Under Delivery date & time, select "send now" or you can choose a date/time. By default, all gift vouchers are sent instantly.

Step 7. 

From the dropdown, select the number of driving lesson hours to purchase. Once chosen, the total amount payable (after any discounts) will be displayed.

Step 8. 

Enter your recipient's details. Please take your time and double check the spelling of their name and email address or mobile phone number where applicable.

Step 9. 

Enter your details. Again, please take your time and double check the details. We will send you an instant payment receipt to the email address that you provide.

Step 10. 

Type a personalised message for your recipient (optional). Check the preview to ensure that you are happy with everything.

Step 11. 

Click Continue to Payment.

Step 12. 

Enter your Payment Details. 

Step 13.

Enter your Billing Details, these will appear on your payment receipt and cannot be changed or reissued. 

Step 14.

Scroll down to check the summary of your gift voucher purchase, it will include the recipient information, the purchase price, delivery method and when it is scheduled to be issued.

Step 15.

Once complete, click Complete Payment at the bottom of the screen.

articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform. You are trying to:  Redeem a gift voucher. Overview:...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

Redeem a gift voucher.

Overview:

When a driving lesson gift voucher is purchased, there are three different delivery options to choose from:

  1. Delivery by email
  2. Delivery via SMS
  3. Printed voucher (QR code)

The redemption process will depend on which option was selected. See below for further information on each.

All options will direct you to our website, from there you can either:

  • Create a new learner account - use the instructor search tool to choose an instructor in your area. Once you have found your perfect instructor, simply click Book Online Now. You will need to create your learner account, once the account is created the credit will be automatically added to your EzLicence wallet and ready to book.
  • Log in to an existing learner account - you can simply log in and the credit will automatically be applied.

Option 1 - Delivery by Email

The gift voucher will be sent via email directly to the recipient. Within the body of the email, there will be a 'redeem now' button. See example below:

When you click Redeem Now, you will be linked to our website.

Please note:. The learner must receive the original email. If the person giving the voucher has printed the email, they will need to forward the original email to the recipient to enable them to redeem the gift voucher using the unique URL provided in the email.

Option 2 - Delivery via SMS

The gift voucher will be sent via SMS (text) message. The SMS message contains a link that will direct the learner to our website.

Option 3 - Printed voucher (QR code)

A printed gift voucher will include a QR code. To redeem the gift voucher, this code must be scanned by the QR reader app on your mobile phone. Please see the example below:

Once scanned you will be linked to our website.

articles.title: How many driving lessons do I need?
articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform. You are trying to:  Understand how many lessons you...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

Understand how many lessons you might need.

Overview:

After your first driving lesson, your driving instructor will be in the best position to assess how many driving lessons you should take, based on factors such as:

  • Previous driving experience, if any
  • Confidence level
  • How quickly you appear to learn and master driving techniques

A New Driver

If you have no driving experience at all, we recommend at least 10 to 15 hours of driving lessons with an accredited driving instructor. For less confident learners, it’s not unusual to book up to 20 hours of instruction. We all learn at different speeds, and it is important to make sure you have a handle on what you’ve been taught in your driving lessons, not just for your driver’s test, but to be a safe and competent driver.

If you are a new driver but have had some driving experience, say with a family member or friend, we recommend at least 7 to 10 hours of driving instruction to fine-tune your skills and prepare for your driving test.

International Driver’s Licence Holders

Most international driver’s licence holders purchase between 3 to 6 hours of driving instruction to prepare for the driver’s test in Australia. Notably, there has been a high failure rate in this category, so less confident drivers may want to take we between 6 to 9 hours of driving lessons before attempting the driving test.

Already licenced but wanting to learn how to drive a manual car

Most learners who already hold an Australian Driver's Licence, but wish to learn in a manual vehicle, will require 3 to 5 hours of driving lessons.

These ranges are a guide only and will vary from learner to learner.

articles.title: How to cancel a booking with your instructor
articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform You are trying to:  Cancel a booking with your driving...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform

You are trying to: 

Cancel a booking with your driving instructor 24 hours beforehand

Overview:

The EzLicence platform has been designed to provide you with maximum scheduling flexibility. We understand that things can change.

As an EzLicence learner, you are able to cancel your booking online up to 24 hrs prior to the booking start time. When you cancel, you will instantly receive the credit back into your EzLicence wallet. All booking credits are valid for 24 months.

If it is less than 24 hours before the booking start time, you are able to cancel your booking online as a late cancellation.

How to cancel a booking with your instructor 24 hours beforehand

Step 1.

Log in to your learner account

Step 2.

On your Dashboard, scroll down to Bookings

Step 3.

Select Upcoming from the dropdown.

Step 4.

Locate the booking and click the Booking #

Step 5.

Click Modify Booking.

Step 6.

Two options will appear, click Cancel (Reschedule Later).

Step 7.

A confirmation box will appear, click Cancel Booking to cancel the booking. 

Step 8.

An on screen confirmation will appear and you will be taken back to your Dashboard.

articles.excerpt: This will be useful if:  You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform. You are trying to:  Understand how to get...
articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Driving Instructor User of the EzLicence booking platform.

You are trying to: 

Understand how to get paid.

Overview:

Managing your earnings has never been easier! Our streamlined payment system ensures your earnings are handled efficiently and transparently.  With EzLicence, you get paid on time and without any hassles, letting you focus on what matters most. 

  1. Payout Frequency:
    • Choose your preferred payout frequency: weekly, fortnightly, or monthly.
    • Refer to our support article - How to set your payout frequency
  2. Automatic Payments:
    • Payments are processed automatically 90 minutes after a booking end time
    • Refer to our support article - How to access your next payout information
  3. Payment Reversal:
    • You have up to 30 days to reverse a payment and return credits to the learner's account.
    • Refer to our support article - How to reverse a payment

Payment amount doesn't look right

Sometimes, we get it wrong. It doesn't happen often but if it does, please let us know. You can submit a support request as soon as possible. Please provide the following information:

  • Booking ID
  • Learner name
  • Date and time of booking
  • Details of what you were expecting to be paid

Once our team receives the request, they will investigate further and get in touch with you to rectify the issue.

articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform

You are trying to: 

Make contact with your driving instructor.

Overview:

EzLicence makes booking with your instructor super quick and easy.  When you create a booking through the platform you can give your instructor all the information they need, without the need to contact them directly: 

  • Check their availability in real-time and book straight into their calendar.
  • Tell them where you’re at in your learning journey by completing the “experience questionnaire” when you book.
  • Tell them about specific requests for your lesson (ie. focus on parallel parking and 3-point turns) by leaving a note on your booking.
  • Manage your booking in real time, including booking, rescheduling and cancelling.

There are a few circumstances where we do encourage you to speak directly to your driving instructor: 

  1. Late cancellations (Less than 24 hours before the booking start time)
  2. Communicate specific pick up instructions on the day of your booking

Please be mindful that instructors are often driving and in lessons, so they may not get back to you immediately.

How to contact your driving instructor

Step 1.

Log in to your learner account.

Step 2.

On your Dashboard, you will see your instructor’s profile picture. Just next to this is their contact number.

Step 3. (optional)

If you have bookings with multiple instructors, there will be a tab at the top of your dashboard, to enable you to switch between instructors.

articles.title: Bonus Logbook Hours
articles.excerpt: The ability to record bonus logbook hours varies by state. NSW, QLD, ACT Taking structured driving lessons with an EzLicence driving...
articles.content:
The ability to record bonus logbook hours varies by state.

NSW, QLD, ACT

Taking structured driving lessons with an EzLicence driving instructor in NSW, QLD and ACT allows you to record 3 hours of driving experience in your logbook for every 1 hour of driving instruction, up to a maximum of 30 hours recorded for 10 hours of driving lessons. You can, of course, continue to take driving lessons with EzLicence driving instructors after you have recorded the maximum allowable bonus, but each 1 hour will equal 1 hour in your logbook.

Note that if you take a driving lesson at night (i.e. between sunset and sunrise), you can only record 1 hour of night driving. The remaining 2 hours are added to your log of day driving experience hours.

TAS

In Tasmania, you’ll get 1 extra hour of credit for every hour of driving instruction, up to a maximum of 20 hours recorded for 10 hours of driving lessons.

articles.content:
This will be useful if: 

You are a Learner User of the EzLicence booking platform

You are trying to: 

Check my booking details.

Overview:

Once you have created your EzLicence learner account, you are able to manage all of your purchases and bookings via your learner account.

From your dashboard, you can make a new booking, reschedule or cancel an existing booking as well as purchase additional driving lessons and test packages.

You can view your booking details in a few simple steps.

How to check my booking

Step 1.

Log in to your learner account

Step 2.

On your Dashboard, you can view all of your bookings under Upcoming Bookings 

Step 3.

Click the Booking # to view all the details.

Step 4.

In this view, you can see the booking details, the amount deducted from your EzLicence Wallet and a history of any changes made.

What if my booking isn’t there?

There are a couple of reasons why your booking may not appear in your Upcoming Bookings list:

1.    You have logged into the wrong learner account

Sometimes learners create more than one learner account using different email addresses. Have you logged in using the correct email address?

2.   The booking was saved but not confirmed

When you are making a booking, you can add multiple dates and times to book more than one booking. Each time you add a new date and time, you click save, but there is one final step, confirm bookings. Please click here for further information.
